case_title: MARIANO VEGA VS. PACIFICO ARCEO JR.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY VEGA, MARIANO AS TO DEFENDANT ARCEO JR., PACIFICO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2011 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF VEGA, MARIANO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00<WAIVED>) SERVED MAR-22-2011, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARCEO JR., PACIFICO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-03-2011 - DEPT. 506, JUDGE DON MITCHELL, CLERK: S. RAVINANTAPRICHA, NOT REPORTED. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. MATTER WAS HEARD, ARGURED AND TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION. NO EXHITBIT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF VEGA, MARIANO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARCEO JR., PACIFICO $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,500.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
